tests.test: Normalize segment earnings over multiple cycles
tests.result: Not passed with current packet; retained as a residual risk.

tests.test: Build independent capacity and closure map by product
tests.result: Not passed with current packet; retained as a residual risk.

tests.test: Reconcile project spend, startup losses and mature cash return
tests.result: Not passed with current packet; retained as a residual risk.

residual_risks: Maintenance capex and full-cycle segment cash earnings are not independently reconciled.
No product-level external capacity map calibrates the explicit reserve.
Major project remaining spend and mature owner returns are not disclosed sufficiently to reproduce option value.
strongest_failure_path: New domestic capacity and imports arrive as demand slows; spreads and utilization fall, downstream margins mean-revert, and the $8.9 billion investment cycle earns below cost of capital while startup and maintenance cash needs persist.
